steps.t: Radagast can be found at Hultvís. You should talk to Radagast.
Varthmath and Gandalf can be found at the Beorninghús. You should talk to Varthmath and Gandalf.
Radagast can be found on the northern edge of the Gladden Fields. You should travel to the Gladden Fields to meet with Radagast and Gandalf.
Radagast can be found on the northern edge of the Gladden Fields. You should talk to Radagast in the Gladden Fields.
Gandalf can be found on the northern edge of the Gladden Fields. You should talk to Gandalf in the Gladden Fields.
Varthmath can be found at the old dock in the south-east side of the Gladdenmere. You should talk to Varthmath in the Gladdenmere.
